commit.message:
[renovate] Align ws-0297 workflow ownership

Purpose: Bring the workstream manifest and doc boundary in line with the workflow baseline repair before the next governed internal push.
Scope: Add the validate workflow and workflow test surface to ws-0297 ownership, document the first Gitea Actions failures plus the baseline fix, and capture the failed push/local workstream-surfaces receipts.
Status: The local workstream-surfaces check now exits cleanly again for the updated branch boundary.
Next: Re-push codex/ws-0297-live-apply into private Gitea, confirm the branch advances to this commit, and rerun validate plus Renovate on the repaired workflow baseline.
See also: ADR 0297
